location: Dropped by the Magma Wyrm boss inside Gael Tunnel, a mine dungeon on the Limgrave/Caelid border reached from Rotview Balcony.
tactics: From Rotview Balcony grace, head south past a camp of Caelid soldiers to the Gael Tunnel entrance
Descend to the Gael Tunnel grace at the bottom, then proceed into the boss arena
Highly vulnerable to magic damage — multi-hit sorceries break its poise fast
Watch for its lava-spew-then-dash attack; stay mobile in the fairly confined arena
lore: Said to be forged from glintstone by a master smith of Sellia, the sorcery-obsessed town buried in Caelid's rot. Its blade is said to glow faintly with trapped moonlight when sheathed — the source of its name.

builds.name: INT/Dex mage-blade
builds.why: Moderate Dex plus heavy Int investment scales both its physical and magic damage, plus ranged poke from Transient Moonlight

builds.name: Bloodloss Dex build
builds.why: Fixed 50 Bloodloss buildup and a high crit multiplier make it viable as a status weapon even with modest Int
